title: Message Level 4: Return Values from Fetch and Select Connector Requests
breadcrumbs: Message Level 4: Return Values from Fetch and Select Connector Requests
text: Message Level 4: Return Values from Fetch and Select Connector Requests These messages show either the number of hits selected, or the length of the I/O buffer fetched. If there is enough room, this information is included on the same line as the connector function call messages. Otherwise, it displays on another line. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
